backend.changelog: BOM Explorer: the '3DX documents' toggle (renamed from 'Enable 3DX export') now also controls the BOM Tree. When off, platform documents - derived outputs, attachments and specifications - and their status indicators are hidden; drawings and generated files always stay visible. Re-enable in Settings - Funkcije.

cadBridge.changelog: Resolve virtual components by their stable child name so STEP and 3D PDF are produced for them (fixes the in-session vs BOM parent-name mismatch that left them missing on a fresh cache).
